failures_details.output:
--- shfmt drift ---
diff ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_gate_prerun_check.sh.orig ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_gate_prerun_check.sh
--- ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_gate_prerun_check.sh.orig
+++ ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_gate_prerun_check.sh
@@ -81,10 +81,10 @@
 
 STATUS=0
 OUTPUT=$(cd "$REPO4" && bash "$GATE" 2>&1) || STATUS=$?
-if [ "$STATUS" -ne 0 ] \
-  && echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "dangling symlink" \
-  && echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "nonexistent-target" \
-  && echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "590"; then
+if [ "$STATUS" -ne 0 ] &&
+  echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "dangling symlink" &&
+  echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "nonexistent-target" &&
+  echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "590"; then
   ok "dangling symlink → exit 1 with target, recovery, and issue citation"
 else
   fail "dangling symlink: expected exit 1 with diagnostic, got status=$STATUS output=$OUTPUT"
